title: Traditional Ukrainian Pork Dumplings
description: A classic Ukrainian dish of rich, fluffy pork dumplings that are a staple of the country's cuisine. These dumplings are perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the ground pork, all-purpose gluten-free flour, salt, and grated onion. Mix well until just combined.
Gradually add the warm water to the bowl and mix until the dough comes together.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces.
Roll each piece into a ball and flatten it slightly into a disk shape.
Place a tablespoon of the pork mixture in the center of each disk.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the dumplings for 10-12 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Drain the dumplings and serve hot with a dollop of sour cream and chopped fresh parsley.
Heat a tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the dumplings and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley and a dollop of sour cream.
